ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the quote was created */,
  "quote_type" TEXT /* Type of quote (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed coverage information */,
  "discounts_applied" TEXT /* Any discounts applied to the quote */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Payment frequency (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model for which the quote was created */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the policyholder's location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the policyholder's location */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder associated with the quote */,
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company providing the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_insurance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the car */,
  "car_type" TEXT /* Type of car (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the car */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the policyholder */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the policyholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the policyholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "driving_record" TEXT /* Summary of driving record (e.g., clean, accidents) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the insurance company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., sales, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or territory the agent covers */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quote_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the agent making the update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_history_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_quotes" (
  "agent_quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent-quote pair */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the quote */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being managed */,
  "quote_status" TEXT /* Status of the quote (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "commission_earned" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on the quote */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer on the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_quotes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_quotes_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id")
)
